info.title: Syntr Email API
info.description: High-performance email infrastructure. Manage design assets, audience segments, and delivery schedules via a unified API.

servers.description: All API clusters are hosted on managed instances with SSL/TLS 1.3 encryption.

get.description: Fetch all provisioned mailboxes, their delivery health, and verification states.

post.description: Initiate DNS/Email verification for a new identity.

provider.description: Provider type (aws_ses, gmail_smtp, wildduck, email_infrastructure, smtp)

gmail_app_password.description: Gmail app password if using gmail_smtp

get.description: Fetch full detailed state of a sending identity.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter: draft, scheduled, sending, completed, failed, paused, cancelled

example.name: Summer Sale 2024
example.subject: Exclusive 50% Off for you, {{name}}!
example.preview_text: Don't miss our hottest sale of the year!

post.description: Create and start a campaign in one go.
Push an active draft into the delivery stream.
Set a future date for broadcast.

get.description: Download full campaign report in multiple formats.

post.description: Halt an active or scheduled broadcast temporarily.
Abort a scheduled or sending campaign permanently.

get.description: Fetch all profiles with their segmentation and health status. Supports filtering by specific list segments.

parameters.name: recipient_list_id
parameters.description: Filter contacts belonging to a specific segment.

post.description: Create or update profile with custom metadata and list associations.

list_id.description: Optional: Target list ID to associate the contact with.

tags.description: Optional: List of tags to apply.

post.description: Perform batch actions (add, remove, move, delete) on subscribers.

excludedIds.description: IDs to skip if selectAll is true

post.description: Ingest batch of contacts via background worker.

get.description: Fetch all segment categories and their aggregate metrics.
Retrieve detailed configuration and statistics for a specific segment.
Fetch all contacts belonging to a specific segment with pagination.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by email or name within the list

get.description: Download raw segment data for offline analysis.

post.description: Stage a raw HTML layout for campaign injection.

subject.description: Default subject line for this template

get.description: Retrieve full details for a specific design asset, including its HTML content, default subject line, and latest modification timestamp.
Fetch all identities capable of receiving inbound messages (Gmail OAuth, WildDuck, Stalwart IMAP).
Fetch messages for a specific sending identity.

parameters.name: senderId
parameters.description: REQUIRED. The ID of the sender identity.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Token for the next page of results.

parameters.name: label
parameters.description: Filter by label (e.g. INBOX, SENT). Default: inbox

get.description: Retrieve full headers and body of a specific inbound message.

parameters.name: senderId
parameters.description: REQUIRED. The ID of the sender identity.

parameters.name: mailboxId
parameters.description: Optional mailbox ID for WildDuck identities.

example.subject: Re: Your Pitch
example.body: I would love to learn more...

post.description: Move message from Spam/Junk to Inbox. JSON body: senderId (UUID), messageId; mailboxId required for WildDuck and Stalwart (same as list row).
Trigger a personalized email to a specific recipient. If the recipient does not exist in your CRM, they will be automatically created using the provided email and name.

to.description: Target email address. Mandatory if recipient_id is not provided.

recipient_id.description: Target existing CRM contact ID. If provided, 'to' can be omitted.

template_id.description: Design asset ID. Required unless raw HTML/Subject are provided.

subject.description: Override or provide custom subject line.

name.description: Recipient display name for CRM sync.

sender_id.description: Specific verified sender ID. If omitted, organization default is used.

params.description: Merge tag values for dynamic personalization.

get.description: Access a detailed audit trail of all developer-triggered messages and their current delivery status.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter: sent, failed, bounced, complaint, opened, clicked

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by email, name, or subject

post.description: Execute a batch of transactional messages. You may provide a specific 'emails' array for unique payloads per user, or a 'list_id' to target an entire segment with 'common_params'.

emails.description: List of individual messages: [{to, recipient_id, params, name}]

list_id.description: Fetch all recipients from a specific list.

template_id.description: REQUIRED. The design asset to use for this batch.

common_params.description: Global merge tags shared by all batch recipients.

post.description: Directly inject a contact into a specific list from your messaging infrastructure.

list_id.description: The segment ID to bind this contact to.

get.description: Retrieve segment metadata to ensure list_id validity before batch messaging.
